# Puffin Ship

> Puffin Ship is a managed AI video production service. Businesses send raw material — clips, calls, webinars, product footage — and receive polished, on-brand short-form videos on a monthly cadence. No editor to hire, no production to manage.

## What it is

Puffin Ship turns existing raw material into finished short-form video content, delivered every month. Operators use an AI-assisted production platform to cut, caption, brand-style, and review each video before delivery. The system learns a customer's brand look and voice over time, improving consistency with every delivery.

This is a managed service, not self-serve software. Customers do not use the platform directly — they submit material and receive finished videos.

## Packages and pricing

- **Starter** — 6 videos per month, $750 to $1,500/mo. Includes short-form editing, captions and brand styling, monthly delivery, defined revisions.
- **Growth** — 12 videos per month, $1,500 to $3,000/mo. Includes everything in Starter plus multi-format output (9:16, 16:9, 1:1), priority turnaround, brand memory.
- **Pro** — 24+ videos per month, $3,000 to $6,000+/mo. Includes everything in Growth plus multiple brand workspaces, dedicated operator, volume rates.

On-site filming and full social media management are available as add-ons. Volume and agency rates available on request.

## Who it's for

- **Direct businesses** — realtors, gyms, clinics, restaurants, and local service brands that need recurring video without an in-house production team
- **Agencies** — social media and marketing agencies that need scalable video production capacity for client work without hiring more editors
- **Expert-led businesses** — coaches, founders, consultants, and educators turning calls, webinars, and domain knowledge into a steady stream of short-form clips

## How it works

1. **Send your material** — submit clips, calls, webinars, product footage, or existing long-form content, plus brand guidelines
2. **We produce and review** — operators use the AI platform to cut, caption, and brand-style each video, then review and rank outputs for quality
3. **Approve and publish** — polished short-form videos are delivered on a monthly cadence, ready to post; revisions are available within each package

## Video formats delivered

- 9:16 vertical — for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts
- 16:9 landscape — for YouTube, LinkedIn, ads
- 1:1 square — for Instagram feed, LinkedIn

All formats include on-brand captions and brand styling.
